privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a fully synthetic Oracle XE 18c database schema populated dynamically via SQL Developer scripts during setup. I confirmed that the dataset explicitly injects exactly four intentional accounting errors according to setup_task.sh: 1) JE-2024-0047 has a precise $5,000 debit/credit mismatch (debit 45,000 vs credit 40,000). 2) JE-2024-0023-DUP perfectly duplicates the $12,500 trade show expense in JE-2024-0023. 3) Two intercompany entries (JE-2024-IC-003 and JE-2024-IC-004) total $75,000 without a matching intercompany_eliminations record. 4) A $25,000 capex for a CNC machine in JE-2024-0055 is incorrectly debited to account 29 (Utilities Expense) instead of account 7 (Property, Plant & Equipment). The expected verifier and export procedures match the task instructions perfectly.
